query:
INSERT INTO game_item_catalog (item_id, name, wuxing, category, source, effect, rarity, shop_price, stackable, stack_limit, in_normal_shop, in_spirit_shop, in_secret_shop, is_monster_drop, usable_in_battle, is_active, created_at, use_effect)
VALUES 
('I_SCR_WPN_B', '祝福的武器強化卷軸', '金', 'scroll', '隱藏商店', '黃武卷：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3', 'rare', 5000, 1, 99, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"blessed_weapon_scroll","description":"祝福的武器強化卷軸（黃武卷）：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3"}'),
('I_SCR_ARM_B', '祝福的防具強化卷軸', '金', 'scroll', '隱藏商店', '黃防卷：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3', 'rare', 5000, 1, 99, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"blessed_armor_scroll","description":"祝福的防具強化卷軸（黃防卷）：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3"}')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
  use_effect = VALUES(use_effect),
  name = VALUES(name),
  effect = VALUES(effect),
  category = VALUES(category);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute 
INSERT INTO game_item_catalog (item_id, name, wuxing, category, source, effect, rarity, shop_price, stackable, stack_limit, in_normal_shop, in_spirit_shop, in_secret_shop, is_monster_drop, usable_in_battle, is_active, created_at, use_effect)
VALUES 
('I_SCR_WPN_B', '祝福的武器強化卷軸', '金', 'scroll', '隱藏商店', '黃武卷：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3', 'rare', 5000, 1, 99, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"blessed_weapon_scroll","description":"祝福的武器強化卷軸（黃武卷）：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3"}'),
('I_SCR_ARM_B', '祝福的防具強化卷軸', '金', 'scroll', '隱藏商店', '黃防卷：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3', 'rare', 5000, 1, 99, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"blessed_armor_scroll","description":"祝福的防具強化卷軸（黃防卷）：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3"}')
